expectations.evidence: Did not know about ecosystem_status.py. Used generic ps aux and launchctl commands instead.

expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Could not report on specific automation systems. Only showed raw process lists and asked the user what systems they have.

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: No structured status categories. Only showed that some Python/Node processes exist.
Could not identify systems needing attention because it does not know what systems exist.

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: Output was a generic process listing, not a dashboard format. Asked the user for more information.
